title: Say You Won't Let Go
why_this_song: Say You Won't Let Go by James Arthur (2016) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Just say you won't let go"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "But I wanna stay with you until we're grey and old"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I'll wake you up with some breakfast in bed"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "And you asked me to stay over"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "But I wanna stay with you until we're grey and old"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "won't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "won't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: I wanna dance with you right now, oh

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask James Arthur one question about "Say You Won't Let Go", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para James Arthur sobre "Say You Won't Let Go", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Say You Won't Let Go" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Say You Won't Let Go" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Say You Won't Let Go" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Say You Won't Let Go" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
